name: Scene Timeline Demo
description: Manual two-fader show-clock scaffold mirroring the shape of what create_scene_timeline (Layer-1, v0.7.0) builds: a Timer CHOP playhead and a segments table DAT (intro / drop / outro) are provided as helper scaffolding, plus a chained two-crossfader stack (fadeAB → fadeBC) over three scene sources. Important: the playhead and segments table are NOT auto-wired to fadeAB.cross / fadeBC.cross — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only, no expressions. After import, the artist drives the two Fade knobs manually (live or via exposed controls), or sets fadeAB.cross / fadeBC.cross expressions referencing op('playhead_null')['timer_fraction'] and the segments DAT. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live cook-check UNVERIFIED pending TD run.

nodes.name: playhead
nodes.comment: Show-clock playhead. 30s total, looping. cycleLimit=0 → no auto-stop.

nodes.name: playhead_null
nodes.comment: Stable channel ref for downstream bind_to_channel ('timer_seconds', 'timer_fraction').

nodes.name: segments
nodes.comment: Declarative segments: idx,name,cue,start,end,morph_in,slot. Matches tdmcp_scenes shape from create_scene_timeline.

nodes.name: sceneA
nodes.comment: Scene A (intro): slow mono noise field.

nodes.name: fadeAB
nodes.comment: Scene A→B crossfader. Driven manually from the playhead's t_norm via the Cross knob.

nodes.name: fadeBC
nodes.comment: Scene B→C crossfader. Chained after fadeAB.

preview_description: A 30-second show-clock scaffold with three scene sources (slow mono noise, radial ramp, deep violet hold) feeding a manual two-crossfader stack — the artist drives the Fade A→B / Fade B→C knobs by hand (or wires them to the playhead) to blend through intro / drop / outro.
